examples.text: Picture warm, gooey cookies, crunchy candies, velvety cakes, waffle cones piled high with ice cream. Is your mouth watering?
examples.explanation: 想象一下温热的、软糯的饼干，酥脆的糖果，丝绒般的蛋糕，以及堆满冰淇淋的华夫筒。你的口水是不是流出来了？

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena

reviewSessions.example_text: Picture warm, gooey cookies, crunchy candies, velvety cakes, waffle cones piled high with ice cream. Is your mouth watering?
matched_points: 准确回忆出目标词 crunchy
